creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Following yesterday's discussion on IRC with dch@, I prepared a primitive fix[1], completely unaware of the existence of this PR, rather inspired by this forum thread [2]. It's not any sophisticated, but does its job. Perhaps it could be rewritten/refactored/reimplemented. If you think so then please go ahead and improve it.

1. https://github.com/zoulasc/blocklist/pull/17
2. https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/blacklistd-and-sshd-not-acting-immediately-according-to-logs.82523/
